Class AESVaultEncryptingStrategy

java.lang.Object
com.seq.acheron.secrets.symmetric.VaultEncryptingStrategy
com.seq.acheron.secrets.symmetric.AESVaultEncryptingStrategy
public class AESVaultEncryptingStrategy extends VaultEncryptingStrategy
AES-based encryption strategy using Argon2 to derive a key from the user's master password.

This strategy:

  • Derives VaultEncryptingStrategy.derivedKey from a master password + salt using Argon2.
  • Generates or accepts a random VaultEncryptingStrategy.vaultKey used with AES-GCM.
  • Allows exporting and importing the VaultEncryptingStrategy.vaultKey wrapped (encrypted) with VaultEncryptingStrategy.derivedKey via the base class.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class VaultEncryptingStrategy

    derivedKey, transformation, vaultKey

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AESVaultEncryptingStrategy(String masterPassword, String saltBase64, boolean generateVaultKey)
    Creates a new strategy instance that: Derives VaultEncryptingStrategy.derivedKey from the given master password and salt using Argon2. Generates a new random VaultEncryptingStrategy.vaultKey internally if generateVaultKey is set to true; otherwise, it will remain null
    AESVaultEncryptingStrategy(String masterPassword, String saltBase64, SecretKey vaultKey)
    Creates a new strategy instance using an existing VaultEncryptingStrategy.vaultKey.

  • Constructor Details

    • AESVaultEncryptingStrategy

      public AESVaultEncryptingStrategy(String masterPassword, String saltBase64, boolean generateVaultKey) throws GeneralSecurityException
      Creates a new strategy instance that:
      • Derives VaultEncryptingStrategy.derivedKey from the given master password and salt using Argon2.
      • Generates a new random VaultEncryptingStrategy.vaultKey internally if generateVaultKey is set to true; otherwise, it will remain null
      Parameters:
      masterPassword - the user's master password
      saltBase64 - Base64-encoded salt used for Argon2
      generateVaultKey - Whether the constructor builds a random VaultEncryptingStrategy.vaultKey or not
      Throws:
      GeneralSecurityException - if key generation fails

    • AESVaultEncryptingStrategy

      public AESVaultEncryptingStrategy(String masterPassword, String saltBase64, SecretKey vaultKey)
      Creates a new strategy instance using an existing VaultEncryptingStrategy.vaultKey.

      This constructor is typically used when reopening an existing vault: the vault key is first unwrapped using VaultEncryptingStrategy.derivedKey, and then passed here to be reused.

      Parameters:
      masterPassword - the user's master password
      saltBase64 - Base64-encoded salt used for Argon2
      vaultKey - an existing vault key to reuse
